notes: v0.12.5 — Discord PNG transparency hotfix. v0.12.3/v0.12.4 shipped a discord.png that had a white background (qlmanage rendered the SVG over a white canvas). Regenerated the PNG directly via PIL so the corners are alpha=0 and the Clyde mark sits centered. Otherwise identical to v0.12.4 (Glass Panel left rail + real FFT spectrum + new currency icons). Windows only.
